path: Sets for R^n are Subspaces for R^n Corrolary-20250110232255777.webp
text: Proof: Foreachi,l <i<m,letW, = {(x;, ... x)|awx, + - - + apx, = O} Then since W is precisely the set of solutions of the simultaneous system formed from the defining equations of all the W,, we have W = W, N W, N - - - N W,. Each W, is a subspace of R" [see Example (1.2.2)], so by Theorem (1.2.13) W is also a subspace of R". H
